name: Does Siri optimization cost money, or can I do it for free?
description: You can do most Siri optimization for free in Settings. Paid help is only needed for advanced setup or troubleshooting.

mainEntity.name: Does Siri optimization cost money, or can I do it for free?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most Siri tuning costs nothing if you are doing it yourself in Settings. Cost only comes in if you hire help, need device troubleshooting, or are optimizing a business workflow with custom Shortcuts and app integrations.
acceptedAnswer.description: You can do most Siri optimization for free in Settings. Paid help is only needed for advanced setup or troubleshooting.
